problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
hypothesis: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Reservoir. Reservoir computing with physical substrate directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
